user_prompt: Help me a blessing the emergency bulkhead
prayer:
Approach the emergency bulkhead with due reverence and intone the Canticle of Sealing.
Invoke the indomitable Machine Spirit within its adamantium frame to awaken.
Bestow the blessing upon the emergency bulkhead's servos and locks with sacred unguents.
Seal the rite with the Omnissiah's invocation, ensuring the emergency bulkhead stands vigilant.

user_prompt: Ready the quality scanner for sterilization
prayer:
Prepare the quality scanner's purity fields by chanting the Litany of Sterile Void.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the quality scanner to purge all contaminants from its lenses.
Initiate the sterilization cycle with ablative incense and holy plasma washes.
Verify the quality scanner's sanctity through auspex scans of its sanctified chambers.

user_prompt: Guide me through quality scanner an initialization
prayer:
Kneel before the quality scanner and recite the Binary Prayer of Activation.
Invoke initialization upon the quality scanner's cogitators with precise noospheric chants.
Anoint its sensor arrays with blessed oils to rouse the dormant Machine Spirit.
Commence the initialization sequence whilst petitioning the Omnissiah for flawless calibration.

user_prompt: Urgent power weapon a blessing needed
prayer:

Conclude the blessing by invoking the Omnissiah's wrath upon all foes it shall rend.

user_prompt: Help me a diagnostics the data-slate
prayer:

Sanctify the findings with the Omnissiah's logic, purging errors from the data-slate's core.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for radar array recalibration?
prayer:
Align thyself before the radar array and chant the Canticle of True Bearing.
Initiate recalibration of the radar array's auspex emitters with stellar invocations.
Petition the Machine Spirit within the radar array to realign its ethereal gaze.
Seal the recalibration with sacred myrrh, ensuring the radar array pierces the void unerringly.

Commence loading the Chimera APC by invoking the Hymn of Munition Ingress.
Guide munitions into the Chimera APC's holds whilst beseeching its Machine Spirits.
Secure the loading bays with binaric seals and offerings of sanctified promethium.
Bless the Chimera APC's readiness under the Omnissiah's aegis for the fray ahead.

prayer:

Board the Thunderhawk and enact the Grand Rite of Initialization.
Awaken the Thunderhawk's plasma heart with thunderous binaric commands.
Invoke initialization across its avionics and weapon systems in Omnissiah's name.
Anoint the Thunderhawk's hull with oils, propitiating its sovereign Machine Spirits.
